nodes.summary: Prettier code formatting configuration for the pgwire JavaScript/TypeScript test files.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: NPM package configuration for the pgwire JavaScript tests, listing devDependencies and test scripts using Jest.

nodes.name: pgwire.test.ts

nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the pgwire test suite.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the resource_util crate, which provides utilities for querying system CPU and memory resources including cgroup support.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Provides functions to query available CPU and memory resources from both the operating system and Linux cgroup v1/v2 subsystems, with container-aware detection for Kubernetes and Docker.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the runtime utility crate, which configures the tokio async runtime for RisingWave services.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the sync-point crate, providing a synchronization primitive for deterministic test coordination.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Implements a global `SyncFacility` that allows tests to emit, wait on, and hook into named synchronization points for deterministic concurrency testing.

nodes.name: SyncFacility
nodes.summary: Core synchronization facility holding a map of notifiers and action hooks keyed by sync-point name, supporting wait/emit/hook operations.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the variables utility crate that provides global server state variables.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Provides global server start time initialization and retrieval via a once-cell, used for tracking process uptime.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the workspace-config crate, which propagates shared workspace-level configuration (features, dependencies) across all crates.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Explains how the workspace-config crate uses a build script to inject workspace-level feature flags into all depending crates.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Placeholder library file for the workspace-config crate; actual functionality lives in the build script.

nodes.name: .gitattributes
nodes.summary: Git attributes file for the workspace-hack crate, marking generated files for diff exclusion.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Build script for the workspace-hack crate, generated by cargo-hakari to speed up workspace compilation.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the workspace-hack crate, generated by cargo-hakari to deduplicate shared dependencies across the workspace for faster builds.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief explanation of the workspace-hack crate purpose: it is managed by cargo-hakari to optimize workspace build times.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Empty library file for the workspace-hack crate; all content is auto-generated by cargo-hakari.

nodes.name: grafana.ini
nodes.summary: Minimal Grafana configuration for the standalone RisingWave deployment, disabling authentication and enabling anonymous access.

nodes.name: prometheus.yml
nodes.summary: Prometheus scrape configuration for the standalone RisingWave deployment, setting a 5-second scrape interval and targeting RisingWave component metrics endpoints.
